tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: teammate_A is offloading work by appealing to my skill, which clashes with my afternoon plan and values relationships over task efficiency.

desires: Protect the long-term trust and closeness with teammate_A by renegotiating this workload boundary directly rather than silently absorbing it.
Preserve my evening meal ritual with cohort_3 to maintain my primary source of social connection and energy, even if it means delaying task completion.
Avoid the cumulative stress of a 2-hour sleep debt compounding tomorrow by refusing to extend my work block into late night hours.
Prevent setting a precedent where I am the 'reliable' fixer for others' offloading, which would erode our relationship dynamic over time.

goals.description: Immediately respond to teammate_A via text to assertively decline the extra workload, explaining that my current capacity is maxed out and I cannot absorb their tasks without renegotiating our agreement.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) drives me to protect long-term trust, but my assertiveness axis requires me to set boundaries directly now rather than silently resenting it later. Refusing prevents eroding the relationship dynamic by establishing a precedent of being the 'reliable fixer'.

goals.description: Complete only my own share of the project within the remaining afternoon block, ensuring I finish exactly by 17:00 to preserve time for my evening meal ritual with cohort_3.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my highest priority; skipping the meal with cohort_3 would drain my primary energy source. My deliberate planning horizon means I must stop work early to avoid compounding my 2-hour sleep debt, which would compromise my health and future performance.

goals.description: Defer all discussion about the extra task until tomorrow morning when we can meet in person or have a scheduled video call to formally renegotiate roles.
goals.rationale: I am deliberate; resolving this conflict in a rushed text message might lead to unnecessary emotional friction. A formal, face-to-face (or voice) conversation aligns better with my need to maintain high-trust relationships through clear, direct communication.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (boundary setting) to preserve trust without silent resentment. Aligns with affiliation (protecting future dynamic) and assertiveness (direct refusal). Prevents burnout from extra work that would jeopardize the meal ritual with cohort_3.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: I can't take on your share today. My capacity is maxed out for my own deliverables, and I need to protect our long-term working relationship by not overcommitting. Let's discuss a formal renegotiation of roles tomorrow morning.

action.reasoning: Advances g1 (boundary setting) to preserve trust without silent resentment. Aligns with affiliation (protecting future dynamic) and assertiveness (direct refusal). Prevents burnout from extra work that would jeopardize the meal ritual with cohort_3.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'I can't take on your share today. My capacity is maxed out f'.
